phaseInfo.description: Bootstrap new monorepo for AI coding platform with 9 platform services + 3 AI services. Establish repository structure, tooling, CI/CD foundation, and infrastructure-as-code setup before implementing any business logic.

scope.objective: Create production-ready monorepo scaffold with complete developer experience, CI/CD pipelines, observability infrastructure, and deployment automation - ready for Phase 1 service implementation

inScope: Package manager setup (npm workspaces or pnpm workspaces)
Build tooling (tsup or esbuild for services)
Docker setup (multi-stage Dockerfiles, docker-compose for local dev)
Observability stack (Grafana, Tempo, Loki, Prometheus via docker-compose)
Database setup (PostgreSQL 16 with docker-compose, migration tooling)
CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions: lint, test, build, SBOM, deploy)
Development scripts (dev, build, test, lint, typecheck)
Secret management setup (External Secrets Operator manifests)
Service mesh prep (Istio/Linkerd decision + initial configs)

technical: No frontend frameworks (vanilla JS only when needed)
All configs as code (no manual setup steps)
operational: All commands must work on macOS/Linux
Local dev environment runnable with `docker-compose up`

inputs.name: Complete Technical Specifications
inputs.description: 100% complete specs: 5 OpenAPI files, DB schema, observability configs, health checks, S2S auth code, deployment sequences
inputs.validationCriteria: All artifacts copy-paste ready, zero pseudocode

inputs.name: Architecture Decision
inputs.description: Platform (9 services) + AI layer (3 services) architecture with clean boundaries
inputs.validationCriteria: Service list, tech stack, execution model defined

inputs.name: User Experience Specs
inputs.description: Non-technical founder persona, Create Project journey, gates G0-G8 in UI

outputs.name: Monorepo Structure
outputs.description: Complete directory tree with all folders, package.json workspaces, tsconfig hierarchy
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript compilation succeeds (even with empty services)
All scripts in root package.json work

outputs.name: Local Development Environment
outputs.description: Full observability stack + PostgreSQL + Redis runnable locally
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose up starts all infra services

outputs.name: CI/CD Pipelines
outputs.description: Reusable workflows for validate, build, test, sbom, deploy

outputs.name: OpenAPI Specifications
outputs.description: 5 complete OpenAPI 3.1 specs from Round 3 delivery
acceptanceCriteria: swagger-cli validate passes for all 5 specs

outputs.name: Database Foundation
outputs.description: Schema, migration tooling setup, seed data templates
acceptanceCriteria: Migration applies cleanly to empty PostgreSQL 16 DB

outputs.name: Observability Dashboards
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 JSONs import to Grafana without errors
Dashboards render (queries may be empty until services running)

outputs.name: Shared Packages
outputs.description: Reusable health, auth, observability, config packages

outputs.name: Documentation
acceptanceCriteria: README has quickstart (< 5 commands to run locally)

implementation.approach: Scaffold monorepo top-down: structure → tooling → infra → shared packages → service templates → CI/CD → docs. Validate each layer before proceeding.

steps.name: Repository Initialization
steps.description: Create repo, initialize Git, setup .gitignore, LICENSE (MIT), basic README
steps.validation: git status shows clean working tree, .gitignore present

steps.name: Monorepo Structure
steps.description: Create directory tree for services, packages, infra, docs

steps.name: Package Manager Setup
steps.description: Initialize npm workspaces, setup root package.json with scripts

steps.name: TypeScript Configuration
steps.description: Create root tsconfig.json, service-specific extends, strict mode

steps.name: Linting & Formatting
steps.description: ESLint 9.x flat config, Prettier, integration with TypeScript
steps.validation: npm run lint passes on scaffold code

steps.name: Testing Framework
steps.description: Vitest workspace config, coverage thresholds (80% line, 75% branch)
steps.validation: npm test runs (no tests yet, but framework works)

steps.name: OpenAPI Specifications
steps.description: Copy 5 OpenAPI YAML files from 13_round_3.md into services/*/openapi.yaml
steps.validation: swagger-cli validate services/*/openapi.yaml passes for all 5

steps.name: Database Setup
steps.description: golang-migrate setup, initial migration (11 tables), docker-compose PostgreSQL 16
steps.validation: migrate up applies cleanly, migrate down rolls back

steps.name: Docker Compose (Infra)
steps.description: Grafana, Tempo, Loki, Prometheus, PostgreSQL, Redis in docker-compose.yml
steps.validation: docker-compose up starts all services, health checks green

steps.name: Observability Setup
steps.description: Copy 4 Grafana dashboard JSONs, Prometheus alerts YAML, configure datasources
steps.validation: Grafana dashboards import successfully, queries validate (may be empty)

steps.name: Shared Packages
steps.description: Create packages/health, packages/otel, packages/config with exports
steps.validation: Each package compiles, exports work when imported

steps.name: Service Templates
steps.description: Create src/index.ts, health.ts, Dockerfile for each service (minimal scaffold)
steps.validation: Each service builds, Docker image builds successfully

steps.name: Kubernetes Manifests
steps.description: Namespace, Service, Deployment templates for each service (placeholder replicas: 1)
steps.validation: kubectl apply --dry-run=client succeeds for all manifests

steps.name: CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: GitHub Actions workflows: validate.yml, build.yml, sbom.yml
steps.validation: Workflows validate against schema, jobs defined correctly

steps.name: Documentation
steps.description: README (quickstart), CONTRIBUTING (PR checklist), ARCHITECTURE (service map), API_STANDARDS
steps.validation: Docs render correctly, all links work, code examples valid

steps.name: Pre-commit Hooks
steps.description: Husky + lint-staged for auto-lint/format on commit
steps.validation: git commit triggers hooks, fails on lint errors

steps.name: Environment Templates
steps.description: .env.example with all required vars, config validation in packages/config
steps.validation: Config validation rejects missing vars, accepts valid .env

steps.name: Final Validation
steps.description: Run all validation commands, ensure clean state
steps.validation: All commands exit 0, no errors, infra services healthy

mustPass.test: All services/, packages/, infrastructure/ folders exist with correct nesting

mustPass.description: npm install succeeds without errors or warnings
mustPass.test: npm install && npm ls (no missing dependencies)

mustPass.description: Linting passes on all scaffold code
mustPass.test: npm run lint exits 0, zero warnings
swagger-cli validate services/*/openapi.yaml exits 0 for all

mustPass.description: Database migrations apply and rollback cleanly
Docker Compose infra stack starts successfully
mustPass.test: docker-compose up -d && all services healthy within 60s
All 4 JSON files import via Grafana UI, zero errors
GitHub Actions validator passes for all .github/workflows/*.yml
npm run dev, npm run build, npm test all exit 0 or run successfully
git commit with lint error → commit blocked
README quickstart commands work, ARCHITECTURE matches actual structure

shouldPass.test: npm run sbom generates sbom.spdx.json and sbom.cdx.json
docker build services/auth succeeds (even with minimal code)

risks.mitigation: Use npm workspaces (built-in, stable). Test cross-package imports early.

risks.description: Docker Compose resource limits on developer machines
risks.mitigation: Document minimum requirements (8GB RAM, 4 CPU). Provide docker-compose.minimal.yml.
Add swagger-cli validate to CI, fail on mismatch. Use code generation where possible.
Provide clear migration template, document expand-migrate-contract pattern.

exitCriteria.completionGate: Phase 0 Complete when all 12 mustPass validations succeed AND quickstart (README) works on fresh clone
deliverables: ✅ Complete monorepo with 12 services (9 platform + 3 AI) scaffolded
✅ Local dev environment (docker-compose) running with observability stack
✅ All validation commands passing (lint, typecheck, test, build)
exitCriteria.readyForNextPhase: Phase 1 (Auth Service Implementation) can begin when Phase 0 exit criteria met

references.description: 100% complete specs: APIs, DB, observability, health checks, S2S auth
Non-technical founder persona, Create Project journey

metadata.author: AI Assistant (Claude)
metadata.priority: P0 - Foundation blocker for all subsequent phases
notes: This is Phase 0 for NEW repository (ai-coding-platform), not the current ai_system_executor-mvp
All 100% complete specs from Round 3 (13_round_3.md) are inputs
No business logic in Phase 0 - pure infrastructure and tooling setup
Quickstart must work: clone → npm install → docker-compose up → localhost:3000 Grafana
Phase 1 will implement Auth service as first real service with endpoints
